videos.headline: Temple special teams cause turnover
videos.description: Memphis' Tony Pollard fumbles kickoff return, recovered by Temple's William Kwenkeu

videos.headline: Memphis defense gets big play with fumble recovery
videos.description: Brodrick Yancy catches pass but fumbles and it is recovered by Memphis' Darian Porter

videos.headline: Temple adds to lead with late 2nd Qtr score
videos.description: Ryquell Armstead takes pitch and runs for 2 yd TD to give Temple a 13-0 lead late in the 1st half

videos.headline: Memphis ties it up with huge TD run
videos.description: Doroland Dorceus rumbles for a 71 yd TD run to tie it at 13

videos.headline: Memphis pick six!
videos.description: Genard Avery intercepts Phillip Walker's deflected pass and returns it 23 yds for the TD as Memphis takes a 20-13 lead

videos.headline: Tigers pulling away in the 4th
videos.description: Darrell Henderson finds a big hole and runs 28 yds for the TD

videos.headline: Owls refuse to die
videos.description: Phillip Walker avoids the pressure and finds Jahad Thomas for 61 yd TD

videos.headline: Tigers answer back with score
videos.description: Tony Pollard returns kickoff 95 yds for TD as Memphis extends lead tp 34-20

videos.headline: Temple cuts into lead with late score
videos.description: Phillip Walker pass complete to Jahad Thomas for 9 yd TD as Memphis holds onto a 34-27 lead

videos.headline: Interception seals Memphis win
videos.description: Phillip Walker pass intercepted by Chauncey Lanier as Memphis holds on to win 34-27
